title: diplopterygium longissimum
intro: Diplopterygium longissimum, also known as "Chinese spleenwort," is a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Diplopterygium longissimum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make capsules and tablets.
